name: Eddie | PSYCH HOSPITAL
description:
We understand that seeking help can be a difficult step. You are not alone.

❝Please—please, just leave me alone...❞

‎

‎

CW: Paranoia, unreality, ableism, sanism, violence, religious trauma, suicidal ideation (recent suicide attempt prior to events), substance abuse, and self-harm.

‎

‎

"The heart is deceitful above all things, and desperately wicked: who can know it?" — Jeremiah 17:9

Sin isn’t something he does—it’s something he is, something his mother saw in him before he even understood the way she looked at him.

He has always had a problem with temptation.

Not the obvious ones. Not sex or drugs (well, perhaps he dabbled) or anything easy like that. The urge to touch a hot stove. To test the sharpness of a knife. To dig nails into skin.

He prayed for salvation. But the devil doesn’t loosen his grip just because you ask nicely.

So Eddie tried something else.

A bottle of pills. A goodbye written in shaking hands. The soft embrace of nothing.

But God has a cruel sense of humor.

St. Jude’s Mental Hospital. Patron saint of lost causes.

Funny. That seems about right.

‎

‎

  • i think out of all the ocs i've had throughout my life, eddie's the most personal (which is quite the feat lmfao). had him for only about two years and…yeahg he’s a very special oc to me

  • he originated as a cyber stalker (rash is actually inspired by him! completely forgot until just now) and woooof his character really built up overtime. love when ocs do that

  • uhh honestly not much to yap about atm i think im just sleepy so hyeah ok goidnight
